source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A cylinder of constant volume $4.7 \times 10^{4} \mathrm{~cm}^{3}$ contains an ideal gas at pressure $2.6 \times 10^{5} \mathrm{~Pa}$ and temperature $173^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$. The gas is heated. The thermal energy transferred to the gas is 2900 J. The final temperature and pressure of the gas are $T$ and $p$, as illustrated in Fig. 2.1. Calculate the increase in average kinetic energy of a molecule during the heating process.
extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image object representation rather than a file path or URL
